title: Comment
description: Comment component is an interactive element for displaying and managing user comments on posts. It's essential for social media, blogs, and content-sharing platforms, enabling seamless user engagement in discussions.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using comment.

sections.title: Interactions
sections.description: Demonstrates like toggle and reply action on comment items.

sections.title: Programmatic control
sections.description: Toggle replies and scroll to a specific reply using public methods.

methods.content:
/**
* Scrolls to a specific comment reply by its ID and highlights it temporarily.
* 
* @param id - The ID of the comment reply to scroll to
* @returns void
*/
scrollToReply(id: string): void

props.name: replyCount
props.description: The number of replies to this comment item.

methods.content:
/**
* Toggles the collapse state of the comment replies section.
* 
* @returns void
*/
toggleCollapse(): void

props.name: like
props.description: Indicates whether the comment is liked. This property supports two-way binding.

events.name: likeChange
events.description: Emitted when the like state changes.
